creator: richw@webcom.com
text:
Problem fixed.  My ports tree was out of date.  The newest ImageMagick
(5.3.8.2) compiles successfully with the newest libtool (1.3.4_2) --
though I did have to build and install libtool explicitly (it wasn't
automatically updated in the course of building ImageMagick).

My fault; sorry for the confusion.  Close this one up.

Rich Wales         richw@webcom.com         http://www.webcom.com/richw/
